ab: akokey kamo, ko yangey inyo a maciwalam do rarakeh.
ch: A:大家好，我今天要帶大家去部落訪問耆老。
en: A: Hello everyone, today I’m going to take you to the tribe to interview the elders.

ab: yapiya, ta ipacisirisiring namen do rarakeh so ciriciring no tao.
ch: B:好喔!我們要跟耆老說達悟語。
en: B: Great! We’re going to talk to the seniors with Tao.

ab: ta mo na makaranes?
en: A: Are we almost there?

ab: yamakeykai rana.
en: B:Almost there.

ab: akey kong,namen panangangey imo.
en: A: Grandpa, we’ve come to see you.

ab: sira apo kong, ayoy ta mai kamo do jia, kamo mateneng do ciriciring no tao.
ch: B:你們會說達悟語啊!真是太棒了!
en: B: You guys can speak Tao! That’s great!

ab: akokey kamo, ko yangey inyo a mamoong do kadai.
ch: A:大家好，我今天要帶大家去小米田除草。
en: A: Hello, I’m going to take you to the millet field for weeding today.

ab: noon.
en: B: Yes.

ab: malovot kamo do jia, manakem nyo o ipamoong nyo a paloloen.
ch: A:大家過來排隊，記得帶好工具。
en: A: Come and line up, remember to bring your tools.

ab: noon. ya namen rana nipalolo o ipamoong namen.
ch: B:是的，老師，我們都拿好工具了。
en: B: Yes, sir, we’ve got our tools.

ab: simanngo am makaranes ta?
en: A: Are we there yet?

ab: jiarai pa.
en: B: Not yet, it’s still far away.

ab: mangey mo taktakan.
en: A: You go watering.

ab: noon,mangey ko taktakan.
en: B: Okay, I’ll water it.

ab: apey o ipanvoyow so lacyow ang.
en: A: You go get the bird catcher.

ab: noon,voyaoen ko o lacyow.
en: B: Okay, I’ll go and catch the birds.

ab: akokey kamo,mangey ta manita so aro a omowmalalam.
ch: A:大家好，我們今天要去動物園。
en: A: Hello everyone, we are going to the zoo today.

ab: jiaraheta! makongo tamo a mangey do dang?
ch: B:好棒喔!我們要怎麼去呢?
en: B: Awesome! How are we going to get there?

ab: mavang tamo do aleleh.
en: A: Let’s take the bus.

ab: matoatonton kamo do jia, ta manazang ta so kippo ta.
ch: A:大家排好隊，我們準備買票。
en: A: Everyone line up, we are ready to buy tickets.

ab: noon.
en: B: Yes.

ab: do sazapen ta am aro a meyyasasalap, do ta likodan am aro a voley. nakenakem nyo a meylingalingey.
ch: A:前面是鳥類，後面是蛇類，大家自己參觀。
en: A: There are birds in the front and snakes in the back.

ab: ko ikanyahey o voley.
en: B: I’m afraid of snakes.

ab: cyaha ta manita ka so meyyasasalap.
en: A: It doesn’t matter, then you go and watch the birds.

ab: asa ka vatvatek o icita nyo sya,kai nyo malovot do jiya.
ch: A:我們一個小時後回來集合。
en: A: We’ll be back in an hour.

ab: ayoy. namen isarey jimo a sinsi namen.
en: B: Yes, thank you.

ab: ikongo mo nimacita sicyarow ya.
en: A: What did you see today?

ab: yaro ko nimacita voley kano meyyasasalap.
ch: B:我看到了好多蛇，還有好多鳥。
en: B: I saw a lot of snakes and a lot of birds.

ab: makaksez kamo, ta mangey ta rana.
en: A: Hurry up, we have to go.

ab: siteypa, ta yamazikna o ai ko.
en: B: Wait for me, my feet are tired.

ab: mangey tamo meyyawawat?
en: A: Shall we go swimming together?

ab: noon! mangey tana!
en: B:Yes! Let’s go!

ab: ya teyyaro yameyyawawat do jia.
en: A: There are a lot of people swimming here.

ab: yamarahem do jito, totangyan jia meyyawawat.
ch: B:那裡水很深，我們在這裡游泳就好。
en: B: The water is deep there, so we just swim here.
